result_summary: Updated the RSS daily report format to image-style AI summary cards with core event, industry logic, investment framework, and capital-focus stock-selection guidance.

work_blocks.summary: RSS and Markdown daily reports now use AI summary cards; each topic includes core event, industry logic, investment framework, and capital-focus company traits with 1-2 stock ideas.

run_status_patch.latest_outcome: RSS daily format updated to AI summary cards with capital-focus company traits and limited stock ideas; local generation succeeded through fallback because OPENAI_API_KEY is not set.
run_status_patch.next_recommended_action: Review the generated RSS/Markdown style, then configure OPENAI_API_KEY if LLM-written richer cards are desired.
